name: intent2action ADK Agent
description: Infers structured, ranked action candidates from text or images. This agent never executes actions or calls operational tools.

skills.name: Infer Actions From Text
skills.description: Analyze unstructured text and return possible actions, missing inputs, risk levels, and recommended execution modes.
examples: Client is asking why the sales dashboard is blank since yesterday.
Break these meeting notes into follow-up actions.

skills.name: Infer Actions From Image
skills.description: Analyze image input and return possible actions without executing them.
examples: Analyze this sales chart image and infer review actions.
Analyze this UI image and infer possible remediation actions.
